title: WorkflowRecipe
description: Declarative SDLC workflow recipe — a named ordered list of phases with optional match rules and budget caps.

name.description: Unique identifier (kebab-case). Used as the --workflow=NAME argument value.

match.description: Deterministic signals for auto-selecting this recipe (Iteration 1+). Absent in Iteration 0.

loc_touched_max.description: Recipe matches only when LOC_TOUCHED <= this value.

loc_touched_min.description: Recipe matches only when LOC_TOUCHED >= this value.

has_migrations.description: If true, recipe matches only when HAS_MIGRATIONS == true.

config_only.description: If true, recipe matches only when CONFIG_ONLY == true.

phases.description: Ordered list of phases to execute. Each element is either a phase-name string or an object with name + optional when.

when.description: Conditional expression evaluated after BA output (Iteration 3+). Example: 'complexity == large'.

caps.description: Hard limits for a run of this workflow.

max_total_cost_usd.description: Pipeline halts (with user confirmation) if estimated cost exceeds this value.
